title: Dark mode support
tagline: Add a system-respecting dark colour scheme and a manual toggle persisted to localStorage.
effort: L — CSS token audit + component testing + toggle UI
risk: Low (purely presentational; feature-flagged behind a toggle)
headline: The current stylesheet uses ~40 hard-coded hex colours that bypass the design token layer. Dark mode requires auditing every colour usage, mapping each to a semantic token, then flipping the token set under prefers-color-scheme: dark.

decisions.q: How is the user's preference stored?
decisions.help: localStorage survives tab close; a server cookie allows SSR to avoid flash-of-wrong-theme on load.

options.label: localStorage only — simple, client-side (recommended for now)
HttpOnly cookie — enables server-side theme rendering, no FOUC
Persist to user profile in DB — syncs across devices

decisions.help: Behind a feature flag first means you can merge early and iterate without shipping a half-finished dark mode.

options.label: Ship behind a feature flag; enable by default when 100% of components pass visual QA (recommended)
Ship directly — no flag, done when done
